chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. D – 658 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.4830/2019 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.4831/2019 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 01.10.2019 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant does not press this application, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with the listed applications. Learned counsel for the applicant would be at liberty to approach learned Sessions Judge concerned, for seeking relief available to him under the law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
